name: Homemade Cornbread Mix
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine all ingredients.
2. Stir with a wire whisk until evenly distributed.
3. Pour into a container with a 10-cup capacity and a tight-fitting lid.
4. Seal the container; label with date and contents.
5. Store in a cool, dry place.
6. Use within 10-12 weeks.
Makes about 10 cups of Homemade Cornbread Mix.
